metadata.description: Expanded integration tests including newly added datasets and filter tests (2025-2026)
metadata.changes_9.6: Added text_search category (15 tests): Protein name search (UniProt SwissProt - Insulin, Hemoglobin, Spike glycoprotein), PharmGKB gene search (CYP2D6, VKORC1, SLCO1B1), Orphanet disease name search and validation, HGNC protein name search, Clinical trials sponsor-only search (Pfizer, Novartis), and pollution prevention tests (drug names and conditions should NOT match clinical trials). Tests search improvements including compact.go ExtractSourceName fix for Orphanet names and priority adjustments. Total: 706 tests.
metadata.changes_9.5: Added search_filter category (11 tests): Multi-dataset filter tests (s=hgnc,mondo,efo), single dataset filter, text priority ordering validation, pagination with filters, and invalid filter handling. Tests new comma-separated dataset filter feature and textPriority ordering. Total: 691 tests.
metadata.changes_9.4: Added encode_ccre category (13 tests): ENCODE cCRE (candidate cis-Regulatory Elements) integration tests. Direct cCRE ID lookup, text search by all 7 classifications (PLS, pELS, dELS, CA-CTCF, CA-TF, CA, TF), CEL filters for classification/chromosome/coordinate range, taxonomy cross-references, and attribute validation tests. Total: 680 tests.
metadata.changes_9.3: Added jaspar_tf_binding category (14 tests): JASPAR transcription factor binding profile tests. Direct matrix ID lookup, TF name text search, UniProt/PubMed/Taxonomy cross-references, collection filters (CORE/UNVALIDATED), experiment type filters (ChIP-seq, SELEX), taxonomic group filters, gene to binding profiles via UniProt, and multi-hop queries (TF binding profile to pathways, diseases). Total: 667 tests.
metadata.changes_9.2: Added fantom5_expression category (16 tests): FANTOM5 CAGE expression data integration tests. Gene symbol/Ensembl/HGNC/Entrez/UniProt to promoter mappings, promoter to Ensembl reverse mappings, gene-level expression lookups, enhancer associations, tissue (UBERON) and cell type (CL) expression mappings, multi-hop queries (disease to promoters, promoters to drug targets, gene expression to pathways, promoters to TF networks). Total: 653 tests.
metadata.changes_9.1: Added protein_structures_pdb category (18 tests): PDB protein structure database tests. Direct PDB ID lookup, UniProt/Gene to PDB mappings, experimental method filters (X-ray, cryo-EM, NMR), resolution filters, cross-references to GO/InterPro/Pfam/Taxonomy/PubMed, and multi-hop structure analysis workflows. Total: 637 tests.
metadata.changes_9.0: Added ligand_receptor category (15 tests): CellPhoneDB cell-cell communication tests. Direct interaction ID lookup, gene symbol to interactions, UniProt/Ensembl cross-references, directionality filters (Ligand-Receptor, Adhesion-Adhesion), classification filters, receptor/secreted partner tests, and multi-hop queries for single-cell analysis workflows. Total: 619 tests.
metadata.changes_8.9: Added protein_embedding_similarity category (15 tests): ESM2 protein embedding similarity tests. Direct UniProt ID lookup, ESM2→UniProt cross-references, multi-hop queries (Gene→ESM2→UniProt, ESM2→AlphaFold structures, ESM2→ChEMBL drug targets, ESM2→Pathways), filter tests for top_similarity and similarity_count. Total: 604 tests.
metadata.changes_8.6: Added protein_complexes category (12 tests): CORUM mammalian protein complex tests. Includes complex ID lookup, text search by name/gene, UniProt/Entrez/GO/PubMed/Taxonomy cross-references, subunit mappings, drug target complexes, and multi-hop queries. Total: 558 tests.
metadata.changes_8.5: Added causal_signaling category (12 tests): SIGNOR causal signaling network tests. Includes direct ID lookup, entity name search, UniProt/ChEBI/DrugBank cross-references, PubMed literature, taxonomy organism filtering, mechanism filters, and multi-hop signaling pathway queries. Total: 546 tests.
metadata.changes_8.4: Added transcription_regulation category (10 tests): CollecTRI TF-target gene regulatory network tests. Includes TF/target gene lookups, HGNC/Ensembl cross-references, PubMed literature links, and multi-hop regulatory network queries. Total: 534 tests.
metadata.changes_8.3: Added human_gene_xrefs category (12 tests): tests for addHumanGeneXrefs migration (gene symbol → HGNC → human datasets). Verifies ClinVar, dbSNP, GWAS, HPO, Orphanet mappings go through HGNC for human-only results. Total: 524 tests.
metadata.changes_8.2: Added SCXA single-cell expression tests (CL→scxa_gene_experiment, Gene→scxa_gene_experiment) and CellxGene celltype tests (CL/UBERON/MONDO→cellxgene_celltype). Total: 469 tests.
metadata.changes_8.1: Added advanced_multihop_pipelines category with 11 novel multi-hop queries (4-8 hops): BioGRID interaction to pathways, metabolite to rare disease genes, cell type to BioGRID/drugs/clinical trials, tissue to lipid pathways, phenotype to interaction network/clinical trials, pathway to diseases via ClinVar, Orphanet to ChEMBL/PubChem. Total: 459 tests.
metadata.changes_7.0: Added tests for all 2026-02-04 fixes: BUG-018 (PharmGKB variant→clinical), BUG-020 (ClinVar→dbSNP), BUG-021 (RNACentral text search). Added rare_diseases category (Orphanet, MIM). Added metabolomics category (HMDB). Updated BUG-011/012/016 from known_issues to fixed. Added HPO alternative paths (orphanet, mim, hmdb).
metadata.changes_6.0: Fixed BUG-014/015: MSigDB↔GO and MSigDB↔HPO bidirectional mappings. Fixed HGNC ID resolution (HGNC:#### vs gene symbol). Added MSigDB gene_sets test category.
metadata.changes_5.9: Fixed BUG-013: UniProt↔BindingDB mapping now works. Parser extracts UniProt IDs from numbered chain columns (Chain 1-50).
metadata.changes_5.8: Added HPO disease mapping tests (HPO↔OMIM, HPO↔Orphanet from phenotype.hpoa integration)
metadata.changes_5.7: Fixed filter tests with .0 suffix for floats. Added AlphaFold, Bgee, PubChem Lipinski, GWAS pvalue_mlog, Clinical Trials filters
metadata.changes_5.6: Added comprehensive filter tests for PubChem, ChEMBL, ClinVar, AlphaMissense, PharmGKB, GenCC, GWAS, GO, UniProt, InterPro, Antibody datasets
metadata.changes_5.5: Added MeSH bridge CTD tests, Reactome to Ensembl, CellXGene reverse mappings, clinical trials high-count, MeSH breast cancer hierarchy
metadata.changes_8.0: Added 50 new tests from multi-agent discovery session 2: patent_ip (4), clinical_trials_deep (3), rare_disease_deep (8), cell_type_biology (7), reverse_drug (4), ultra_long_chains (3), interpro_domain (4), gene_set_advanced (8), evidence_triangulation (3), metabolomics (7). New categories: patent_ip, clinical_trials_deep, rare_disease_deep, cell_type_biology, reverse_drug, ultra_long_chains, interpro_domain, gene_set_advanced, evidence_triangulation. Total: 448 tests.
metadata.changes_8.7: Added enzyme_biochemistry category (19 tests): BRENDA enzyme database integration tests. EC number lookups, kinetic parameters (Km, kcat) via brenda_kinetics, inhibitor data (Ki, IC50) via brenda_inhibitor, PubMed literature links, text search by enzyme/substrate/inhibitor names, and multi-hop queries for enzyme-centric analysis. Total: 577 tests.
metadata.changes_8.8: Added UniProt↔BRENDA bidirectional mapping tests (12 tests): protein to EC classification, gene to EC via UniProt, EC to proteins/structures/domains/pathways/drug targets/clinical variants. Leverages UniProt xrefs to BRENDA for multi-hop enzyme-centric queries. Total: 589 tests.

test_categories.gene_mapping: Gene symbol/ID to various resources (proteins, transcripts, GO terms)
test_categories.drug_discovery: Pathway-based and tissue-specific drug target discovery
test_categories.pathways: Pathway and network analysis (Reactome, STRING, Rhea)
test_categories.ontologies: Ontology navigation (GO, EFO, taxonomy, UBERON, CL hierarchies)
test_categories.protein_interactions: Molecular interaction networks (IntAct): protein-protein, protein-small molecule, protein-RNA, protein-gene, mRNA-miRNA
test_categories.gene_expression: Tissue and cell-specific expression (Bgee, UBERON, CL)
test_categories.ncbi_datasets: NCBI/Entrez Gene, RefSeq, PubChem compound mappings
test_categories.data_validation: Data quality validation - attribute correctness, counts, known facts
test_categories.antibody: Therapeutic and structural antibody data (TheraSAbDab, SAbDab, IMGT)
test_categories.clinical_trials: Clinical trial data and disease ontology mappings (ClinicalTrials.gov, MONDO)
test_categories.pubchem_drug: PubChem drug discovery paths (bioactivity, targets, metabolites, CTD)
test_categories.variant_pharmacogenomics: Variant analysis and pharmacogenomics (dbSNP, PharmGKB, AlphaMissense)
test_categories.disease_drug: Disease to drug discovery workflows (MONDO, ChEMBL, DrugCentral, antibodies)
test_categories.expression_celltype: Expression analysis (Bgee, CellXGene, SCXA) and cell type ontology
test_categories.pathway_network: Pathway and network analysis (Reactome hierarchy, STRING, GO reverse)
test_categories.ontology_hierarchy: Ontology hierarchy traversal (MONDO, HPO, EFO parent/child)
test_categories.filters_working: Working filter tests - verified CEL filter expressions
test_categories.filters_broken: Known broken filters - document issues for fixing
test_categories.known_issues: Tests for known bugs - expected to fail until fixed
test_categories.rare_diseases: Rare disease workflows (Orphanet, MIM/OMIM, HPO phenotype-disease mappings)
test_categories.metabolomics: Metabolite analysis (HMDB metabolites, cross-references to PubChem, ChEBI, UniProt)
test_categories.rnacentral_search: RNACentral text search by RNA name, gene symbol, and RNA type
test_categories.patent_ip: Patent and IP analysis pipelines (gene/disease to SureChEMBL patents via PubChem)
test_categories.clinical_trials_deep: Deep clinical trial pipelines (disease to trial drug targets, literature, protein targets)
test_categories.rare_disease_deep: Rare disease deep pipelines (Orphanet/MIM to pathways, interactions, drugs, expression)
test_categories.cell_type_biology: Cell type biology and single-cell (CL ontology, CellXGene reverse queries, tissue drug targets)
test_categories.reverse_drug: Reverse drug-to-biology chains (drug to biological processes, diseases, tissue expression)
test_categories.ultra_long_chains: Ultra-long chains (10+ hops: phenotype to patents, tissue to literature)
test_categories.interpro_domain: InterPro domain analysis (domain to genes, drugs, pathways, structures)
test_categories.gene_set_advanced: Gene set advanced workflows (MSigDB multi-hop, disease to gene sets, GO to drugs)
test_categories.evidence_triangulation: Evidence triangulation and multi-database integration patterns
test_categories.advanced_multihop_pipelines: Advanced multi-hop pipelines (4-8 hops): BioGRID network to pathways, metabolite to rare disease, cell type to drugs/interactions, phenotype to clinical trials, Orphanet to drug candidates
test_categories.human_gene_xrefs: Human gene cross-references via HGNC: tests for addHumanGeneXrefs (gene symbol → HGNC → ClinVar/dbSNP/GWAS/HPO/Orphanet). Ensures human-only gene mappings.
test_categories.transcription_regulation: Transcription factor regulatory networks (CollecTRI): TF-target gene interactions with evidence from 12+ databases, regulation direction (activation/repression), confidence levels, and PubMed literature links.
test_categories.causal_signaling: Causal signaling networks (SIGNOR): 114K+ manually curated causal relationships between proteins, chemicals, and phenotypes. Regulatory effects (up/down-regulates), mechanisms (phosphorylation, binding), confidence scores, and multi-organism support (human, mouse, rat).
test_categories.protein_complexes: Protein complexes (CORUM): 7,969 experimentally characterized mammalian protein complexes. Subunit composition (UniProt/Entrez), GO functional annotations, PubMed literature, organism/taxonomy, drug target associations, and multi-hop queries for complex-centric analysis.
test_categories.enzyme_biochemistry: Enzyme biochemistry (BRENDA): EC number enzyme classification, kinetic parameters (Km, kcat), inhibitor data (Ki, IC50), organism-specific enzyme information, and literature references. Multi-hop queries for enzyme-centric drug discovery and biochemical pathway analysis.
test_categories.protein_embedding_similarity: ESM2 protein embedding similarity: Deep learning-based protein similarity using ESM2 embeddings. Captures functional and structural relationships beyond sequence identity. Top-50 similar proteins per query with cosine similarity scores. Multi-hop queries for homolog discovery, function transfer, and drug target expansion.
test_categories.ligand_receptor: CellPhoneDB ligand-receptor interactions: 2,911 curated cell-cell communication interactions for single-cell analysis. Ligand-receptor pairs, adhesion molecules, secreted proteins, and protein complexes. Cross-references to UniProt, Ensembl, HGNC, PubMed. Filters for directionality, classification, receptor/secreted status. Essential for spatial transcriptomics and scRNA-seq communication analysis.
test_categories.protein_structures_pdb: PDB protein structure database: 248K+ experimentally determined 3D structures. Experimental methods (X-ray crystallography, cryo-EM, NMR), resolution data, cross-references to UniProt/GO/InterPro/Pfam/Taxonomy/PubMed. Filters for method type and resolution. Essential for structural biology, drug design, and protein engineering workflows.
test_categories.fantom5_expression: FANTOM5 CAGE expression data: ~185K promoters (CAGE peaks/TSS), ~65K enhancers, ~20K gene-level aggregations. TPM expression values across 1800+ samples. Cross-references to Ensembl/HGNC/Entrez/UniProt/UBERON/CL. Filters for TPM thresholds, expression breadth. Essential for promoter/enhancer biology, tissue-specific expression, and transcription start site analysis.
test_categories.jaspar_tf_binding: JASPAR transcription factor binding profiles: ~6K curated TF binding motifs (PFMs/PWMs) from CORE and UNVALIDATED collections. Cross-references to UniProt, PubMed, Taxonomy. Filters for collection (CORE/UNVALIDATED), experiment type (ChIP-seq, SELEX, PBM), taxonomic group (vertebrates, plants, insects). Essential for TF binding site prediction, regulatory element analysis, and gene regulation studies.
test_categories.encode_ccre: ENCODE cCRE (candidate cis-Regulatory Elements): ~2.3M regulatory regions from ENCODE SCREEN. Classifications include PLS (promoter-like), pELS (proximal enhancer-like), dELS (distal enhancer-like), CA-CTCF (CTCF-bound), CA-TF (TF-bound), CA (chromatin accessible), TF (transcription factor only). Genomic coordinates (chromosome, start, end). Cross-references to taxonomy (human GRCh38). Filters for classification, chromosome, coordinate range. Essential for regulatory element analysis, enhancer/promoter biology, and epigenomics studies.
test_categories.search_filter: Search endpoint filtering and ordering: Multi-dataset filter (s=hgnc,mondo,efo), single dataset filter, text priority ordering (datasets with higher textPriority appear first in search results), and pagination with filters. Essential for efficient LLM agent queries and result prioritization.
test_categories.text_search: Text search improvements: Protein name discovery (UniProt SwissProt), PharmGKB gene priority, Orphanet disease names, clinical trials sponsor search. Tests search result quality and pollution prevention.
